_source: National Tax Agency (国税庁) — reflects 令和7年度税制改正 (2025 reform), applicable from the 2025 tax year
_notes: Income tax (所得税) brackets apply to taxable income after all deductions. Rates are marginal.

employment_income_deduction._notes: 給与所得控除 — deduction from gross employment income before applying brackets. 2025 reform raised the minimum from ¥550,000 to ¥650,000 (binds for salaries up to ¥1,900,000).
employment_income_deduction._formula: For rate-based brackets: deduction = income × rate + base

basic_deduction._notes: 基礎控除 — keyed off 合計所得金額 (NET income after employment income deduction), NOT gross salary. 2025 reform: ¥580,000 baseline up to ¥23.5M, with temporary low-income boosts (¥950k/¥880k/¥680k/¥630k) for the 2025 and 2026 tax years. From 2027 the boosted tiers above ¥1.32M revert to ¥580,000 (the ¥950,000 tier for income ≤ ¥1.32M is permanent).

_notes_residence_basic: 住民税の基礎控除 — unchanged by the 2025 reform (43万円, income ≤ ¥24M). Residence tax therefore has a HIGHER taxable base than income tax.

spouse_deduction._notes: 配偶者控除 — 2025 reform raised the spouse salary limit from ¥1.03M to ¥1.23M (spouse 合計所得金額 ≤ ¥580,000).

_notes_wall: The '103万円の壁' became the '160万円の壁' from 2025: basic deduction ¥950,000 + employment income deduction minimum ¥650,000.

public_pension_income_deduction._notes: 公的年金等控除 — deduction applied to pension income

retirement_income_deduction._notes: 退職所得控除 — for iDeCo lump sum and retirement severance
